verdict.answer_first: A states the core answer immediately: "Both languages free memory automatically by tracking reachability"; B also starts well but adds broader setup before specifics.
verdict.decisiveness: A gives a tighter committed explanation around reachability, mark-and-sweep, V8 generational GC, and Go concurrent non-generational GC; B surveys more internals and takeaways.
verdict.actionability: A is faster to use right now because it explains the mental model and key runtime differences without extra table/detail overhead.
